name: @jeswr/kernel-e2-prep
description: E2 geometry-alignment probe prep (docs/poc-design.md Phase E, E2): kernel-side RDM inputs, baseline RDMs, context/pool generation, and tests. The GPU-side runner lives in runner/ (python).

scripts.items: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/itemsGen.js
scripts.kernel-rdm: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/kernelRdm.js
scripts.gloss-rdm: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/glossRdm.js
scripts.wordnet-rdm: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/wordnetRdm.js
scripts.word2vec-rdm: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/word2vecRdm.js
scripts.contexts: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/contexts.js
scripts.freq-pools: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/freqPools.js
scripts.inputs: npm run items && npm run kernel-rdm && npm run gloss-rdm && npm run wordnet-rdm && npm run word2vec-rdm && npm run contexts && npm run freq-pools
scripts.test: npm run build && nice -n 10 node --test dist/test/
